title: rosa gallica f. flaccida
intro: Rosa gallica f. flaccida, also known as the 'Blanc Double de Coubert', is a variety of the historic Rosa gallica, an ancient species of rose that is native to Europe. The plant contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds that have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa gallica f. flaccida include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Rosa gallica f. flaccida is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
